summary: Completed testing of Ocean2joy simplified workflow. Backend APIs all pass (13/13 tests). Frontend Order Activation and Operational Chain working correctly. Fixed issue where Order Activation was showing for completed projects.

ui_bugs.issue: Order Activation section was showing for completed projects - FIXED by adding status check

integration_issues.issue: Backend endpoint POST /api/admin/projects/{id}/send-invoice exists and works, but no UI button/form found in AdminProjectManagement.js to trigger it

action_items: Add 'Send Invoice' UI button/form in AdminProjectManagement.js to call POST /api/admin/projects/{id}/send-invoice endpoint
Consider adding invoice amount input field and send button for admin to send invoices to clients
critical_code_review_comments: Backend API for simplified workflow is complete and working correctly
Order Activation section now correctly hidden for completed/in-progress projects
Operational Chain displays correct documents: Quote Request → Invoice → Payment → Receipt → Certificate (no Quote)
Sub-steps for Quote Request and Invoice are correctly implemented
Invoice signature upload via PDF works correctly and updates status to INVOICE_SIGNED

success_rate.frontend: 95% (Order Activation fix applied, Send Invoice UI missing)

seed_data_creation: Multiple TEST_ prefixed projects created during backend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Simplified workflow tested. Order Activation shows for submitted projects only. Backend APIs all working. Main missing feature is Send Invoice UI in admin panel.

order_activation.details: Client can fill Brief, upload files, select payment method (PayPal/SWIFT/QR), and activate order

operational_chain.details: Displays Quote Request → Invoice → Payment → Receipt → Certificate (no Quote document)

invoice_upload_ui.details: Client can upload signed Invoice PDF when invoice_sent_at is set

invoice_signed_status.details: After uploading signed Invoice, status changes to INVOICE_SIGNED

order_activation_hidden_for_completed.details: Order Activation section now hidden for completed/in-progress projects
